chunks.text: 1 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 301 of 2023 (Business Dynamics Enterprises & others Versus Asifa Usman & others) Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing Case (Priority) For order on office objection a/w reply at A 2. For hearing of Main Case 3. For hearing of CMA No. 3651/2023 (stay) Dated 29.04.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani Advocate for the Appellant M/s. Muhammad Naseer and Ghulam Abbas Pishori Advocates for the Respondent No.1.-.-.-.-.-. Both the learned counsels have agreed that although it was an urgent application on which impugned order was passed, however, during the order passed in another suit No. 563 of 2023 wherein the notices were ordered and two suits, i.e. No. 563 of 2023 and Suit No. 1657 of 2022 (wherein impugned order passed) were ordered to be fixed together. He submits that statusquo order would be harsh. The maintenance of statusquo means, as agreed by counsel, the affairs which were shown in motion would continue, unless and otherwise ordered by the learned Single Judge. With this understanding as agreed by all counsel in attendance, the appeal is disposed of along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
